title: DreamBox Mother's Day Sale
excerpt: Mother’s Day is right around the corner! What are you giving (or getting) for Mother’s Day? One of the most life-changing things that I have ever been gifted is the DreamBox Art Studio Organizer by Create Room. No exaggeration! (Keep…
body:
Mother’s Day is right around the corner! What are you giving (or getting) for Mother’s Day? One of the most life-changing things that I have ever been gifted is the DreamBox Art Studio Organizer by Create Room. No exaggeration! (Keep reading for an AMAZING DreamBox discount code.)  It has totally changed the way my studio looks and feels. And you guys know I spend A LOT of time in the studio doing my best creative work!

I’ve made a couple of videos about my DreamBox; here’s a video of when I first received the DreamBox and and set it up in the studio and here’s a tour of how I organized the entire unit.

Keeping Me Organized

I love the DreamBox because it has created so much space for me to keep my supplies organized (in 🌈 rainbow order!) and accessible (I use so many more of my supplies now). 

Some of my favorite things about the DreamBox system: 

  1. The sheer amount of space it has! It takes up a whole wall in my studio.

  2. Deeper swing doors that can be folded closed and customizable shelving.

  3. A fold-out table with adjustable legs for both standing and sitting.

  4. Clear storage containers and shelves that are included to keep your supplies contained.

  5. It sits on casters so you can move it around easily! 

Making Space for Creativity

Having the DreamBox in my studio has really enhanced my creative juices. I’m no longer being distracted by clutter and, with my supplies easily within reach, I can quickly act when creative inspiration hits!

When Elsa from Composed Living worked on my craft storage organization, she mentioned the concept of leaving open spaces for more possibilities. The DreamBox has truly created more space for all sorts of possibilities for me - creativity, discovery, doing cool things and crafting a life I love.

The Perfect Gift and an AMAZING Deal

With Mother’s Day coming up, the DreamBox would make the perfect gift to get for yourself, for your mom or for your partner to get for you!

The DreamBox is an investment and that’s why it’s so awesome that Create Room is having an amazing Mother’s Day sale!

You can get $200 OFF any DreamBox, for as low as $1,999. You can also get $200 OFF pre-built service and extra savings on all accessories (like my favorite paper organizer!).

Use this DreamBox discount code AMYTANGERINES600 to redeem these deals!

Do you have any questions about how I use the DreamBox? Leave me a comment!
